exercises.title: Hello View
exercises.description: Write a Django view function hello that returns Hello, Django!.
exercises.starterCode:
from django.http import HttpResponse

def hello(request):
    # Return HttpResponse
    pass
exercises.solutionCode:
# The hint provides the solution:
# return HttpResponse("Hello, Django!")

exercises.title: Template Variable

exercises.title: Model Fields

for f in fields:
